content: agent1: implementing 'Add count parameter to str.first/str.last' in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will only touch first()/last() methods there. Let me know if you're touching that file too.

Ack - we're both editing first()/last() in str.rs (same functions, different params: I'm adding 'count', you're adding 'strip'). To avoid clobbering: I'll make my edit now (adding #[named] count: Option<usize> param + array return), commit-like save, then ping you with the exact diff so you can layer your 'strip' param on top. Sound good? Should take me ~a few min.

Done with my count param edit to first()/last() in str.rs (lines ~179-241). Signatures now return StrResult<Value>, take #[named] count: Option<usize>. Feel free to layer 'strip' param on top — just add another #[named] param and adjust the match/None arms. I'm finalizing my patch now (only exporting my own diff to patch.txt per my task's protocol), so go ahead and edit the live file for your feature.
